# tfe_organization_run_task_global_settings

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `task_id` (String) The id of the run task.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the run task will be applied globally
- `enforcement_level` (String) The enforcement level of the global task.
- `stages` (List of String) Which stages the task will run in.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the task settings
